title: Haddi
description: Haddii is a bone-themed survival/combat overhaul for Fabric 1.21.11. It adds custom bone gear (weapons, armor, and a Bone Staff), dangerous Bone Rain weather events, and friendly summonable skeleton guards in creative mode.
body: Haddii is a bone-themed survival/combat overhaul for Fabric 1.21.11. It adds custom bone gear (weapons, armor, and a Bone Staff), dangerous Bone Rain weather events, and friendly summonable skeleton guards in creative mode. The mod focuses on high-pressure skeleton combat, unique projectile mechanics, and bone-based progression with custom crafting recipes and visuals.
